scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/agent-core && npm run build -w apps/agent-sidecar && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/agent-core && npm run test -w packages/contracts && npm run test -w packages/agent-core && npm run test -w apps/agent-sidecar
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/desktop && npm run lint -w apps/agent-sidecar && npm run lint -w packages/contracts && npm run lint -w packages/agent-core
